boards.title: Full Panel
boards.blurb: The real front panel, control for control, in the traced geometry — every knob, selector, slide switch, bus tap and patch jack the instrument carries, colour-coded by which board actually backs it

boards.title: Polyphonic (48ch)
boards.blurb: The whole keyboard in one wasm: 48 hardwired channels, phase-locked octaves, SINGLE/MULTIPLE trigger

boards.title: Composed Instrument
boards.blurb: One wasm, all boards inside — the GEG→VCA wire is sample-accurate in the DSP

boards.title: Gate / KORG35
boards.blurb: One of 12 per-note channels: pass-gate VCA + the KORG35 cell, junction crunch and all

boards.title: Voice Chain
boards.blurb: Same chain as chained Web Audio nodes — A/B against the composed build

boards.title: Resonators
boards.blurb: Triple vactrol bandpass bank — play the keybed through it

boards.title: Sample & Hold
boards.blurb: JFET switch + hold cap, patched to a VCO for stepped random pitch

boards.title: VCA / Phone Amp
boards.blurb: Dual series vactrol gain cells — keybed-gated, the vactrol is the envelope

boards.title: Ensemble
boards.blurb: Two MN3004 BBD channels beating against each other — hold a chord

boards.title: MOD-VCA / MG2
boards.blurb: Vactrol gain cell + the board's own triangle LFO, patchable onto its CV

boards.title: MG1 / Noise
boards.blurb: Exponential-law triangle LFO + avalanche noise with the exact pink ladder

boards.title: Balance / AM
boards.blurb: Upper/lower channel mixer meeting a JFET AM cell — sidebands on the scope

boards.title: Signal Generator
boards.blurb: One of the 12 per-note VCO cards: dividers + the 8-level staircase waveshaper

boards.title: GEG Envelope
boards.blurb: Current-steering trapezoid CV — delay, linear attack, sustain, linear release

boards.title: Voltage Processors
boards.blurb: Dual bipolar attenuverters on a shared bus — sag and crosstalk SPICE-exact
